sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29521" key="dusteuci/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσ-τευξία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n29521.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">difficulty in securing</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πραγμάτων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.28</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
